provenance: KFX-source. Extracted from SCRUM-283 Unit 3 (cloud Qwen3-VL-A3B) and Unit 5b (Qwen3-VL-Max) smoke runs against the 6-book corpus. All samples observed on technical-layout books (Python in easy steps, Mexico Illicit Drug Networks) where the model emitted default responses instead of real findings. See docs/solutions/scrum-283-cloud-vlm-evaluation.md Lesson 3.
substring_fingerprints: text is clean and readable with no visible artifacts
notes: Matched case-insensitively against issues[i].description. Add new entries only when grounded in a captured response from data/scrum283_unit*/ or later production smoke runs — not speculatively. The empty-issues+high-score (Matcher 1), category_scores collapse (Matcher 3), and dominant-score uniform response (Matcher 4, SCRUM-292) matchers are defined in FingerprintSettings and applied in FallbackFingerprintDetector.detect().
